name: realtime_file_share
description: File sharing application on Cloudflare Workers with R2 and D1

scripts.db:list-files: wrangler d1 execute file_share --command 'SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(size) as total_size FROM files'
scripts.db:cleanup: wrangler d1 execute file_share --command 'DELETE FROM files WHERE expire_at < strftime("%s", "now") * 1000'
